revision.comment: took from Akiha faith, gonna change it now
Text replacement - "|大田田根子" to "|大田田根子|1=Ōtataneko|4=fr|5=Ōtataneko"
Bot: fix redirect [[User:Immanuelle/Generations of Watatsumi]] → [[Template:Generations of Watatsumi]]
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "[[simple:" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:User:Immanuelle/" to "[[sn:User:Immanuelle/"
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24314731306|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Immanuelle%2FFurutama_Faith here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Immanuelle%2FFurutama_Faith for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] -->

{{Navbox
| name  = User:Immanuelle/Furutama Faith
| title = Furutama Faith
| listclass = hlist
| image = [[File:Yagi Shrine Torii.jpg|150px|link=|alt=]]
 |group1 = Principales divinités
 |list1 =
* {{ill|Furutama-no-Mikoto|lt=Furutama-no-Mikoto|lt=Furutama|lt=Furutama-no-Mikoto|ja|布留多摩命|complete=true|en|draft:Furutama-no-Mikoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Furutama|fr|Furutama-no-Mikoto|lt=Furutama-no-Mikoto|lt=Furutama}}
* {{ill|Watatsumi|en}}

 |group3 = Shrines
 |list3 =
* {{ill|Yagi Shrine|ja|夜疑神社|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|fr|Yagi-jinja}}

 |group4 = clans descendants de Futurama
 |list4 =

* {{ill|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|lt=Yamato clan|ja|倭国造|simple|complete=true|10=fr|11=Clan Yamato}}
* {{ill|Yagi clan|ja|八木氏|complete=true|fr|Clan Yagi|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yagi clan}}
* {{ill|Kubiki Kokuzo|ja|久比岐国造|complete=true}}
* {{ill|Akashi no Kuni no Miyatsuko|lt=Akashi Kokuzo|ja|明石国造|complete=true}}
* {{ill|Owari clan|lt=Owari clan|ja|尾張国造|complete=true|en||fr|Clan Owari}}
* {{ill|Kamo clan|ja|賀茂氏|fr|Clan Kamo|en}}
* {{ill|Miwa clan|ja|大神氏|fr|Clan Miwa|en}}
|group5=Figures historiques Miwa
|list5=
* {{ill|Ōtataneko|ja|大田田根子|1=Ōtataneko|4=fr|5=Ōtataneko命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōtataneko|fr}}
* [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]]
* {{ill|Princess Yamato Totohi Momoso|ja|倭迹迹日百襲姫命|en}}
| group6 = Figures historiques Owari
| list6 = 
* {{ill|Takakuraji|ja|高倉下|en}}
* {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|en}}
* {{ill|Miyazu-hime|ja|宮簀媛|en}}
* {{ill|Takeinadane|ja|建稲種命|fr||simple|User:Immanuelle/Takeinadane|en:draft}}

| group7 = Figures historiques Yamato
| list7 = 
* {{ill|Nunaki-iri-hime|ja|渟名城入姫命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Nunaki-iri-hime|fr}}
* {{ill|Ichishi no Nagaochi|ja|市磯長尾市|lt1=Ichisi Nagaochi|lt2=市磯長尾市宿祢|complete=true|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ichishi no Nagaochi|fr}}
* {{ill|Saonetsuhiko|en|8=fr|10=simple|11=User:Immanuelle/Saonetsuhiko}}
* {{ill|Yamato no Agoko|ja|倭吾子籠|lt1=Yamogokoro no Sukune|lt2=倭吾子籠宿祢|complete=true|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yamato no Agoko|fr}}
* {{ill|Yamato no Tehiko|ja|倭手彦|lt1=Yamato no Tehiko|lt2=手彦|complete=true|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yamato no Tehiko|fr}}
* {{ill|Yamato no Iotari|ja|大倭五百足|lt1=Yamato no Iotari|lt2=五百足|complete=true|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yamato no Iotari|fr}}

}}<noinclude>
